scripts.test: bunx playwright install chromium && bun test packages/core packages/cli packages/web
scripts.harness:web: bunx playwright install chromium && bun test packages/web
scripts.harness:web:layout: bunx playwright install chromium && bun test packages/web/test/layout-harness.test.ts
scripts.quality:check: bun run harness:check && bun run --cwd packages/web build
